zh.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德奧斯特賀內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alveradis van Cuijk於1165年11月21日出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，她的父親Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen26歲，母親Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen21歲。她於大約1191年與Dirck II van Voorne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1230年4月18日在荷蘭-拉藍德奧斯特賀內享年64歲。

zh-hans.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德奧斯特賀內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alveradis van Cuijk于1165年11月21日出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，她的父亲Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen26岁，母亲Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen21岁。她于大约1191年与Dirck II van Voorne结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年4月18日在荷兰-拉藍德奧斯特賀內享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Alveradis van Cuijk was born on 21 November 1165, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, her father, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, was 26 and her mother, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, was 21. She married Dirck II van Voorne about 1191. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 April 1230, in Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alveradis van Cuijk est née le 21 novembre 1165, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Dirck II van Voorne environ 1191. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 avril 1230, à Oostvoorne, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alveradis van Cuijk am 21. November 1165 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen 26 und ihre Mutter Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen 21. Sie hat um 1191 Dirck II van Voorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. April 1230 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Oostvoorne, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alveradis van Cuijk è nata il il 21 novembre 1165 nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Dirck II van Voorne circa 1191. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 aprile 1230, nel Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands: オランダホーランドオオストボオルン
ja.Voorne, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドボオルン
ja.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジク
ja.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドオオストボオルン
ja.lifeSummary: Alveradis van Cuijkが1165年11月21日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで生まれた時，父Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsenは26歳，母Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpenは21歳であった。約1191年にDirck II van Voorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年4月18日にオランダズイド-hオランドオオストボオルンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alveradis van Cuijk(이)가 1165년 11월 21일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 쿠이제이크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1191년 Dirck II van Voorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 4월 18일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 스트보른에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.21 November 1165–18 April 1230: 1165 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 21–1230 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 18

pt.21 November 1165–18 April 1230: 21 de novembro de 1165–18 de abril de 1230
pt.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alveradis van Cuijk nasceu em 21 de novembro de 1165, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Dirck II van Voorne aproximadamente 1191. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de abril de 1230, em Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alveradis van Cuijk родилась 21 ноября 1165 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dirck II van Voorne около 1191 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 апреля 1230 г. в местности уствурн, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 64 лет.

es.21 November 1165–18 April 1230: 21 de noviembre de 1165–18 de abril de 1230
es.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alveradis van Cuijk nació el 21 de noviembre de 1165, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Hendrik II van Cuyck van Malsen, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Sophia Rhenen Lady of Herpen, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Dirck II van Voorne aproximadamente 1191. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de abril de 1230, en Oostvoorne, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 64 años.
